hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" session-start-context.sh

repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" subagent-return-channel-guard.sh

repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$repo" bash "$repo/.ai/hooks/run-hook.sh" post-bash.sh
